sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 1:1
items.html: (to the question) The first Zivug [coupling] of the Partzuf is for the essence of the Atzilut [emanation] in it, meaning for the Katnut [smallness] of the Partzuf. It is also called Ibur Aleph [first conception]. And the second Zivug of the Partzuf is for the sake of its Gadlut [adulthood], which is only a discernment of added goodness and not the essence. It is also called Ibur Bet [second conception], for the sake of Mochin. (Items 1 and 2)
